## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution. Include code examples if possible:

```python
# How you'd like the API to look
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've considered and why they're less ideal.

## Use Case

Describe the real-world scenario where this feature would help.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
